_comment: sweetty config for the OPTIONAL HAProxy topology. Listeners bind loopback backend ports (public + 10000, 2323 -> 12323) instead of the public ports; HAProxy fronts only the honeypot ports and reaches each backend with the PROXY protocol, so proxy_protocol below makes sweetty parse that header and recover the real attacker IP (a matched pair with send-proxy in haproxy.cfg). The portal is NOT fronted by HAProxy: it binds loopback (the default) and is reached over the management SSH tunnel, so there is no portal login. The portal proxies the loopback HAProxy stats console at /dashboard/console/haproxy/ over that same tunnel.
